template_data.sub: Agencies have 90 days to obligate the year's remaining budget — and the calls are already going out.

image_headline: FEDERAL Q4 STARTED. ARE YOU VISIBLE?
image_prompt: Alert-style infographic on dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'FEDERAL Q4 STARTS NOW' in white. Center split: left zone labeled 'SCHEDULE ACTIVE' with green checkmark and upward arrow icon; right zone labeled 'NO SCHEDULE' with red X icon. Bottom highlighted callout: '90 DAYS. BILLIONS OBLIGATED.' Illustrated professional man in blazer reviewing a tablet, standing between the two zones. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
